news.t: EXCHANGE TRADED CONCEPTS, LLC. ANNOUNCES COMPLETION OF FUND REORGANIZATIONS
Syntax Advisors Appoints Carly Arison President and Chief Operating Officer

overview.description: The Stratified LargeCap Hedged ETF (SHUS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, aiming for capital growth through a fund-of-funds approach by investing in the SSPY ETF. The underlying fund is passively managed, holding large-cap US stocks SHUS was launched on Jun 15, 2021 and is issued by Stratified.

data.title: Syntax Advisors Appoints Carly Arison President and Chief Operating Officer
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $SHUS--Syntax Advisors LLC, an ETF sponsor and investment advisor (NYSE Arca: SSPY, SMDY, SSLY, SYUS, SHUS), announced today the appointment of Carly Arison to serve as P...
